items.name: Break taken too late
items.description: Break taken after exceeding the maximum hours before break.

items.name: Required break not taken
items.description: Required break (e.g., 30-minute) not taken within the allowed interval.

items.name: Break too short
items.description: Break duration shorter than the rule requires.

items.name: Cycle hours exceeded
items.description: Total on-duty time exceeded the cycle limit (e.g., 60/70 US, C1/C2 CA).

items.name: Restart taken too soon
items.description: Restart attempted before the minimum interval allowed between restarts.

items.name: Invalid/insufficient restart
items.description: Restart taken with fewer hours than required for the cycle.

items.name: Driving after on-duty window
items.description: Driver operated a CMV after the allowable on-duty/shift window ended.

items.name: Driving time exceeded daily limit
items.description: Driver exceeded the maximum daily driving hours allowed by the active cycle/ruleset.

items.name: Driving while in off-duty status
items.description: Driving recorded while status set to Off-duty (excludes PC/YM when valid).

items.name: Passenger daily driving over limit
items.description: Passenger daily driving limit exceeded

items.name: ELD data diagnostic unresolved
items.description: Active data diagnostic not corrected in the required manner/timeframe.

items.name: ELD malfunction unresolved
items.description: ELD malfunction not addressed within required timeframes/procedures.

items.name: ELD data transfer failure
items.description: Required ELD data transfer to enforcement failed at inspection.

items.name: Invalid adverse-conditions claim
items.description: Adverse driving conditions claimed without qualifying conditions.

items.name: Invalid emergency exemption
items.description: Emergency exemption applied without qualifying declaration/period

items.name: Personal Conveyance misuse
items.description: PC used when conditions were not met (e.g., advancing the load or trip).

items.name: Yard Move misuse
items.description: YM used outside yard or for travel that advances the trip.

items.name: Insufficient daily off-duty
items.description: Off-duty time taken in the day was less than required.

items.name: Day 1 deferral short
items.description: Day 1 off-duty taken < (10h − deferred hours)

items.name: Day 2 deferral short
items.description: Day 2 off-duty didn't include (10h + deferred hours)

items.name: Deferral rule misapplied
items.description: Deferral used when conditions weren't met

items.name: Insufficient weekly reset
items.description: Weekly reset/off-duty did not meet required hours for the cycle.

items.name: Missing RODS day
items.description: Required daily record is missing.

items.name: False or inaccurate log
items.description: Records contain false, conflicting, or manipulated entries.

items.name: Form and manner deficiencies
items.description: Mandatory fields (e.g., shipping, trailer, location) missing/invalid.

items.name: Missing location
items.description: Required location not recorded for an event

items.name: RODS not certified
items.description: Driver did not certify daily records of duty status.

items.name: Odometer gap
items.description: Unexplained odometer discontinuity across consecutive events

items.name: Unassigned driving unresolved
items.description: Unassigned driving segments not properly assigned or annotated.

items.name: Short-haul duty window exceeded
items.description: Duty hours exceeded the short-haul limit (e.g., 12/14/16-hour).

items.name: Logging required under short-haul
items.description: Short-haul conditions not met; RODS/logging required but missing.

items.name: Short-haul radius exceeded
items.description: Operations exceeded allowed air-mile/km radius for short-haul.

items.name: Return location violation
items.description: Didn't return to the same reporting location as required

items.name: Invalid sleeper split combination
items.description: Sleeper-berth segments do not form a valid split per the rule.

items.name: Unpaired sleeper split segment
items.description: One sleeper segment recorded without the required complementary segment.

items.name: Consecutive duty window exceeded
items.description: Exceeded maximum consecutive duty windows without required reset.

items.name: Invalid split reset window
items.description: Claimed split didn't properly pause/reset the on-duty window under allowed split rules (US/Canada nuance)

items.name: On-duty window exceeded
items.description: Total on-duty time exceeded the allowed daily/shift limit.
